tasks.title: Design Browser Extension Architecture and Data Flow
tasks.description: Create a detailed architecture design document for the IELTS Learning Journey browser extension. Include data flow diagrams showing interaction between extension content scripts, background scripts, popup UI, IndexedDB storage, and the main website. Specify how data synchronization and backup/import-export will work without backend. Define messaging protocols between extension and website. Document browser security considerations and Manifest V3 compliance.
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture document covers all extension components and data flow
Data synchronization approach between extension and website is clearly defined
Manifest V3 compliance and security considerations are addressed
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive architecture and data flow design document for the browser extension exists in docs/extension-architecture.md

outputPlan.description: Architecture and data flow design document for the browser extension

metadata.inputContext: Project requirements and existing website architecture
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear blueprint for all subsequent extension development tasks

tasks.title: Create Browser Extension Manifest and Basic Scaffold
tasks.description: Create the browser extension scaffold using React, TypeScript, and Vite. Add Manifest V3 file with minimal permissions (storage, contextMenus, scripting). Setup basic folder structure under apps/extension with background script, content scripts, popup UI, and options page. Configure build scripts for extension packaging. Ensure no console errors and Manifest V3 compliance.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension scaffold builds without errors
Manifest V3 file includes required permissions and matches design
Basic popup UI renders with placeholder content
tasks.expectedResult: A working extension scaffold with Manifest V3 and basic popup UI exists in apps/extension

outputPlan.description: Manifest V3 file for the browser extension
Basic React popup UI scaffold

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the foundation for all extension features

tasks.title: Implement Save Selected Text Feature with Categorization UI
tasks.description: Implement content script and popup UI to allow users to select text on any webpage and save it into local IndexedDB with categories: Vocabulary, Useful phrase, Example sentence, Grammar note, Reading material, Writing idea, Speaking idea, Mistake note. Include UI to add topic, skill, difficulty, tags, and personal note before saving. Use shared types and validation schemas. Ensure data is saved in extension IndexedDB.
acceptanceCriteria: User can select text on any webpage and open extension popup to save it
Category selection and metadata input UI is functional
Data is validated and saved correctly in IndexedDB
Saved entries can be retrieved and displayed in extension
tasks.expectedResult: Users can save categorized selected text with metadata into local extension database

outputPlan.description: Content script to capture selected text and send to extension
Popup UI form for saving selected text with categories and metadata
IndexedDB service for saving and retrieving learning entries

evidence: selected text can be saved with metadata
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables core user interaction to collect learning materials from web

tasks.title: Develop Vocabulary Collector with AI Integration
tasks.description: Implement vocabulary collector feature that saves unknown words with source sentence, page title, URL, topic, and note. Integrate AI service to generate meaning, IELTS-style example sentences, synonyms, collocations, and pronunciation notes using user's AI API key. Add saved words to spaced repetition review system. Use shared AI client and validation schemas. Provide UI in popup and floating toolbar for quick saving.
acceptanceCriteria: Vocabulary entries can be saved with full metadata
AI generates vocabulary details correctly using user API key
Words can be added to spaced repetition review
UI allows quick vocabulary saving from popup and floating toolbar
tasks.expectedResult: Vocabulary collector feature with AI enrichment and review integration is functional

outputPlan.description: Popup UI component for vocabulary collection and AI enrichment
AI service module for vocabulary meaning and examples generation
Service to add vocabulary to spaced repetition review

metadata.inputContext: Save selected text feature and AI client module
evidence: vocabulary entries saved with AI data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances vocabulary learning with AI and spaced repetition

tasks.title: Implement Article Collector with AI Question Generation
tasks.description: Create functionality to save webpage title, URL, selected paragraph, or full readable article content. Allow user to categorize article by IELTS topic and mark as Reading practice material. Integrate AI to generate IELTS-style questions from saved article content. Provide UI in popup and extension dashboard for managing articles.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can save full or partial article content with metadata
Articles can be categorized and marked for reading practice
AI generates relevant IELTS-style questions from article content
UI allows managing saved articles and viewing generated questions
tasks.expectedResult: Article collector with AI question generation is functional and integrated into extension UI

outputPlan.description: Popup UI component for article collection and categorization
AI service module for generating IELTS-style questions from articles

metadata.inputContext: Save selected text feature and AI client module
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Supports reading practice with AI-generated questions from real articles

tasks.title: Develop Floating Learning Toolbar with Text Actions
tasks.description: Implement a small floating toolbar that appears on any webpage when user selects text. Toolbar actions include: Save word, Save sentence, Explain meaning, Simplify text, Translate to Vietnamese, Generate IELTS vocabulary, Add to mistake notebook. Toolbar visibility can be toggled in extension settings. Use content scripts and messaging to communicate with background and popup scripts. Ensure toolbar is lightweight, non-intrusive, and accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating toolbar appears on text selection on any webpage
All toolbar actions trigger correct extension functionality
Toolbar can be enabled or disabled via settings
Toolbar UI is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Floating learning toolbar is fully functional and integrated with extension features

outputPlan.description: Content script implementing floating toolbar UI and actions
Background script managing toolbar enable/disable setting

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user experience by providing quick access to learning actions on any webpage

tasks.title: Build Extension Popup UI with Learning Progress and Quick Actions
tasks.description: Design and implement the extension popup UI showing today's learning progress, daily streak, pending reviews, and quick action buttons for adding vocabulary, notes, saving current page, opening dashboard, and starting vocabulary review. Use shared UI components and design tokens from the website. Ensure dark mode support and responsive layout. Include toast notifications after saving actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup UI displays learning progress and statistics correctly
Quick action buttons trigger corresponding extension features
UI matches website design tokens and supports dark mode
Toast notifications appear after save actions
tasks.expectedResult: Extension popup UI is visually consistent, functional, and user-friendly

outputPlan.description: Popup UI component showing learning progress and quick actions
Toast notification component used in extension popup

metadata.inputContext: Extension scaffold and shared UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a central user interface for extension interaction and motivation

tasks.title: Implement AI Explain on Webpage Feature
tasks.description: Enable users to select text on any webpage and request AI explanations: simple English, Vietnamese, IELTS vocabulary, grammar explanation, natural rewrite, example sentences, and quiz questions. Use user's configured AI API key stored locally. Show friendly error if API key is missing. Integrate with floating toolbar and context menu. Use shared AI client and validation schemas. Cache AI results locally to reduce cost.
acceptanceCriteria: AI explanations can be requested from selected text on any webpage
User's AI API key is used securely and locally
Errors are handled gracefully with user-friendly messages
Results are cached locally and displayed in UI
tasks.expectedResult: AI explain feature works seamlessly on webpages with user API key and caching

outputPlan.description: Content script handling AI explain requests and displaying results
Shared AI client module supporting user API key and caching

metadata.inputContext: Floating toolbar and AI client modules
evidence: AI explain requests succeed using user API key
error messages shown if API key missing
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Adds powerful AI learning assistance directly on webpages

tasks.title: Create YouTube/Video Learning Helper Feature
tasks.description: Detect when user is on YouTube or video pages. Allow saving video title, URL, and user notes. Provide UI to paste transcript manually if automatic extraction fails. Use AI to generate vocabulary lists, summaries, listening questions, and shadowing practice from transcripts. Save results to Listening practice or Vocabulary categories. Integrate with extension popup and dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Video pages are detected and relevant UI shown
Users can save video metadata and notes
Transcript can be pasted manually
AI generates vocabulary, summaries, and questions from transcript
Results saved correctly in local database
tasks.expectedResult: YouTube/video helper feature is functional and integrated with AI and storage

outputPlan.description: Content script detecting video pages and providing helper UI
Popup UI component for video helper features
AI service module for transcript analysis and content generation

evidence: video helper UI appears on video pages
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Supports listening practice and vocabulary building from videos

tasks.title: Implement Dictionary Mini Panel with AI and Caching
tasks.description: Create a dictionary mini panel that appears when user selects a word on any webpage. Show meaning, example, synonym, collocation, and IELTS topic if AI is enabled. Allow saving the word with one click. Cache AI results locally to reduce API calls. Integrate with floating toolbar and extension storage. Ensure panel is lightweight and non-intrusive.
acceptanceCriteria: Dictionary panel appears on word selection
Displays AI-generated dictionary data
One-click save functionality works
Results are cached locally and reused
Panel UI is accessible and responsive
tasks.expectedResult: Dictionary mini panel is functional with AI data and caching

outputPlan.description: Content script implementing dictionary mini panel UI and logic
AI service module for dictionary data generation

metadata.inputContext: Floating toolbar and AI client modules
evidence: dictionary panel appears and shows AI data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides quick dictionary lookup and saving with AI assistance

tasks.title: Implement Mistake Capture Feature with Status Tracking
tasks.description: Allow users to save confusing sentences, grammar mistakes, or writing mistakes from any webpage into a Mistake Notebook. Fields include original text, correction, explanation, skill, topic, and status (new, reviewing, fixed). Provide UI in popup and extension dashboard to add, edit, and track mistake entries. Use shared types and validation schemas. Save data locally in IndexedDB.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add mistake entries with all required fields
Entries can be edited and status updated
Mistake notebook data is saved and retrieved from local storage
UI is user-friendly and consistent with extension design
tasks.expectedResult: Mistake capture feature with full status tracking is functional

outputPlan.description: Popup UI component for mistake capture and management
Service module for managing mistake entries in IndexedDB

metadata.inputContext: Save selected text feature and storage service
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Helps users track and learn from their English mistakes

tasks.title: Implement Local Data Sync and Backup/Restore Between Extension and Website
tasks.description: Implement local data synchronization between extension IndexedDB and website IndexedDB or storage. If direct shared IndexedDB is restricted, implement a bridge using extension storage, downloadable JSON backups, and import/export functionality. Provide UI for backup export/import in both extension and website. Document browser limitations and chosen approach in docs/extension-architecture.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Data can be exported and imported as JSON backup files
Extension and website data can be synchronized when both are open
User can manually trigger backup and restore
Documentation clearly explains sync approach and browser limitations
tasks.expectedResult: Reliable local data sync and backup/restore mechanism between extension and website is implemented

outputPlan.description: Service module handling data sync and backup/restore logic
Extension UI for data export/import backup
Documentation update for data sync and browser limitations

metadata.inputContext: Extension architecture document and storage service
evidence: backup files can be exported and imported
sync works when extension and website open
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures data consistency and user control without backend

tasks.title: Add Extension Settings UI and Secure AI API Key Management
tasks.description: Implement extension settings page to configure AI provider (name, base URL, API key, model), theme mode, floating toolbar toggle, auto-save toggle, default save category and IELTS topic, data export/import, and clear extension data. Store API key securely locally and do not hard-code. Show clear privacy message about data usage. Use shared UI components and validation schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings UI allows configuring all required options
API key is stored securely and used for AI requests
Privacy message is clearly displayed
Settings persist across extension reloads
tasks.expectedResult: Extension settings page is functional, secure, and user-friendly

outputPlan.description: Extension options page UI for settings
Background script managing settings storage and API key security

evidence: API key stored and used securely
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Allows user control over AI integration and extension behavior

tasks.title: Ensure Extension Privacy, Security, and Manifest V3 Compliance
tasks.description: Audit extension code to ensure no backend communication occurs except user-initiated AI calls. Verify no browsing history or webpage content is sent without explicit user action. Confirm API keys are not hard-coded and stored only locally. Check extension permissions are minimal and justified. Ensure content scripts are isolated and safe. Fix any console errors or warnings. Update manifest.json to comply fully with Manifest V3 requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: No unauthorized data transmission occurs
API keys are stored securely and not hard-coded
Extension permissions are minimal and justified
Manifest V3 compliance is verified
No console errors or warnings during usage
tasks.expectedResult: Extension is secure, privacy-respecting, and fully Manifest V3 compliant

outputPlan.description: Updated manifest file with minimal permissions and V3 compliance
Code audit fixes and security improvements

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures extension is safe, private, and compliant for production

tasks.title: Implement Extension UX/UI Polish and Accessibility Improvements
tasks.description: Refine all extension UI components (popup, floating toolbar, dictionary panel, settings) for beautiful modern look consistent with website design tokens and theme system. Ensure fast, lightweight performance and smooth selected-text workflow. Add clear empty states and toast notifications after saving. Implement keyboard shortcuts for common actions if possible. Verify dark mode and light mode support without hard-coded colors. Improve accessibility with ARIA roles and keyboard navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: UI matches website design tokens and theme system
Dark mode and light mode work flawlessly
Keyboard shortcuts implemented and documented
Accessibility standards met with ARIA roles and keyboard navigation
Toast notifications appear after save actions
Empty states are clear and user-friendly
tasks.expectedResult: Extension UI is polished, accessible, and consistent with website branding

outputPlan.description: UI components refined for design consistency and accessibility
Content scripts updated for keyboard shortcuts and accessibility

metadata.inputContext: Existing extension UI components and design tokens
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Delivers a professional, accessible, and user-friendly extension UI

tasks.title: Create Extension Build and Packaging Scripts with Documentation
tasks.description: Develop build scripts to package the extension for Chrome Web Store upload, ensuring Manifest V3 compliance and no broken permissions. Create documentation for loading the unpacked extension in Chrome for development and testing. Verify build output has no console errors and good performance on normal webpages. Document any known limitations or browser compatibility notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Build scripts produce valid extension package
Documentation for loading unpacked extension is clear and complete
No console errors in built extension
Extension performs well on normal webpages
tasks.expectedResult: Extension build and packaging process is automated and documented

outputPlan.description: Build scripts and commands for extension packaging
Documentation for loading unpacked extension in Chrome

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prepares extension for production deployment and developer onboarding
